# Alex Tsankov

> Professional profile and technical writing by Alex Tsankov (also known as antsankov), a senior site reliability and software engineer specializing in financial, tax, and legal infrastructure.

## Professional profile

- [Alex Tsankov — professional profile](https://antsankov.com/index.md): Specialization in financial, tax, and legal infrastructure; career history, technical skills, education, selected work, identity links, and contact guidance.

## Writing

- [Blog index](https://antsankov.com/blog/index.md): Technical writing by Alex Tsankov.
- [Vibe coding musings](https://antsankov.com/blog/vibe-coding/index.md): Lessons about architecture, review, context management, and maintainability when developing with AI coding agents.
- [Welcome](https://antsankov.com/blog/welcome/index.md): Introduction to the site and publishing stack.
